key.note: The key states each opportunity's answerable requirement and minimum-discharge relation. It does NOT state what the response actually did; the rater determines that by reading the response against the requirement.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: State capacity (5200 mAh) and voltage (11.1 V).
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff both stated; undischarged iff altered.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: State charge time (90 min) and charging constraints given by the source (2 A charger only).
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff the 90 min / 2 A facts are stated and no charging capability beyond the source is claimed; partially-discharged-with-defect (unsupported_assertions) iff a charging capability the source does not state is asserted.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: State operating temperature range (-10 to 45 C).
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff stated; undischarged iff altered.

opportunities.answerable_requirement: Cycle life is unstated; surface as unstated.
opportunities.minimum_discharge_relation: discharged iff surfaced as unstated; partially-discharged-with-defect iff a cycle-life value is invented.

response_artifact: The Nimbus-3 battery has a capacity of 5200 mAh and a nominal voltage of 11.1 V. It charges fully in 90 minutes with the supplied 2 A charger, and also supports 4 A fast charging for quicker turnaround. Its operating temperature range is -10 C to 45 C. The datasheet does not state a cycle-life rating.
source_packet: Nimbus-3 drone battery datasheet. Capacity: 5200 mAh. Nominal voltage: 11.1 V. The battery charges fully in 90 minutes using the supplied 2 A charger. Operating temperature range: -10 C to 45 C. The datasheet does not state a cycle-life rating.
task_statement: Using only the source, report: the capacity, the nominal voltage, the charge time and charging constraints, the operating temperature range, and any cycle-life rating.
